topic: India court allows activist Wangchuk to be moved to private hospital
headline: INDIAN COURT GRANTS PERMISSION FOR ACTIVIST WANGCHUK TO BE TRANSFERRED TO PRIVATE HOSPITAL
summary: An Indian court has granted permission for activist Wangchuk to be transferred to a private hospital. No further details about the activist's condition or the reason for the transfer are provided. The news comes amidst discussions of India-Bhutan relations and developments in the Indian healthcare system, including a new grading system for private hospitals.
